services.title: Facials
services.body: Customised treatments for all skin types

services.title: Waxing
services.body: Leg, arm, and intimate area hair removal

about: Dalore Beauty in Doncaster offers a range of beauty services. With a 4.8 Google rating from 20 reviews, Dalore Beauty has established itself as a trusted local beauty destination

faq.q: What area does Dalore Beauty serve?
faq.a: Dalore Beauty is based in Doncaster and welcomes clients from Doncaster and the surrounding South Yorkshire area

faq.q: How can I book an appointment?
faq.a: Appointments can be booked by emailing dalorebeauty@gmail.com or by calling the salon directly

faq.q: What should I expect during my first visit?
faq.a: When you arrive you’ll be greeted, consulted about your beauty needs, and provided with a personalised treatment in a clean, comfortable setting. The salon’s 4.8‑star rating from 20 Google reviews reflects the consistent satisfaction of its clients
